hindi: शिरो मे शङ्करः पातु ललाटं चन्द्रशेखरः।
english: May Shankara protect my head, may Chandrashekhara protect my forehead
roman: Shiro me Shankarah patu lalaTam chandra shekharah

hindi: नेत्रे मे पातु त्र्यम्बकः श्रोत्रे सर्वेश्वरः।
english: May Tryambaka protect my eyes, may Sarveshwara protect my ears
roman: Netre me patu Tryambakah Shrotre Sarveshvarah

hindi: मुखं मे पातु पशुपतिः कण्ठं नीलकण्ठकः।
english: May Pashupati protect my mouth, may Neelakantha protect my throat
roman: Mukham me patu Pashupati kaNtham Neelaakanthakah

hindi: बाहू मे पातु भगवान् हस्तौ पिनाकधारकः।
english: May the Lord protect my arms, may Pinakadhara protect my hands
roman: Bahoo me patu Bhagavan hastau Pinaaka dhaarakah

english: May Shankara protect my heart, may Girishaka protect my abdomen

hindi: नाभिं च पातु सर्वेशो लिंगं मे गुह्यपालकः।
english: May Sarvesa protect my navel, may Guhyapalaka protect my private parts
roman: Nabhim cha patu Sarvesha lingam me Guhya palakah

hindi: सर्वांगं मे महादेवः, पातु मूर्तिं त्रिलोचनः।
english: May Mahadeva protect all my limbs, may the three-eyed one protect my form
roman: Sarvangam me Mahadevaah patu Murthim Tri lochanah

english: Whoever reads the Shiva Kavach daily goes to the world of Shiva
roman: Shivakavacham pathen nityam Shivalokam sa gachchhati
